title_zh: 最新研究展示我们的医疗AI AMIE如何助力健康管理

summary_zh: 《自然》杂志研究表明，我们的对话式AI系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生不相上下。
summary_en: Research published in "Nature" demonstrates that our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in managing complex diseases.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究证明了AMIE在医疗健康领域的潜力，显示AI可以辅助医生提升疾病管理效果。
why_it_matters_en: This study highlights AMIE's potential in healthcare, showing AI can assist doctors in improving disease management outcomes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_en: Here are Google's latest AI updates from May 2026, covering cutting-edge technologies and product advances.

title_zh: OpenAI与博通发布专为大语言模型推理优化的芯片
title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
summary_zh: OpenAI与博通联合推出Jalapeño，这是一款专为大语言模型（LLM）推理而设计的定制AI芯片，旨在提升AI系统的性能、效率和规模。
summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom introduced Jalapeño, a custom AI chip designed specifically for large language model (LLM) inference to enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability across AI systems.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着大语言模型应用的普及，对推理性能和能效的需求日益增长，Jalapeño芯片的发布有助于推动AI技术的普及和应用。
why_it_matters_en: As large language models become widely used, the demand for improved inference performance and energy efficiency rises; the Jalapeño chip helps advance AI technology deployment and adoption.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: RIFT-Bench：用于代理式AI系统的动态红队测试
title_en: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
summary_zh: 文章介绍了RIFT-Bench，这是一种基于图表示的方法学，用于对不同代理式AI系统进行动态红队测试，实现统一的安全评估。该方法包括发现系统结构和扫描两阶段，能自动部署多样化的适应性对抗攻击，并生成全面的评估报告。该方法已在45个不同实现的代理系统上验证，能够有效适应异构系统，且支持直接评估缓解策略，成为代理式AI系统安全评估的可扩展基础。
summary_en: This paper introduces RIFT-Bench, a graph representation-driven methodology for dynamic red-teaming that enables unified security evaluations across diverse agentic AI systems. It operates in two automated phases: Discovery to extract system structure, and Scanning to deploy adaptive adversarial attacks and generate comprehensive evaluation reports. Validated on 45 heterogeneous agentic systems, RIFT-Bench generalizes well and also supports direct evaluation of mitigation strategies, making it a scalable foundation for agentic AI system security assessment.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着代理式AI系统的快速发展，其安全风险超出传统大语言模型的范畴。现有安全评估缺乏统一性，RIFT-Bench填补了这一空白，提供了跨多样系统的统一动态红队测试方法，有助于保障AI系统的安全可靠。
why_it_matters_en: Agentic AI systems evolve rapidly, introducing new attack surfaces beyond traditional LLM vulnerabilities. Existing security evaluations are fragmented and implementation-specific. RIFT-Bench addresses this gap by offering a unified, dynamic red-teaming approach applicable across heterogeneous agentic systems, thereby enhancing the security and reliability of AI deployments.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 神经符号驱动：基于规则的忠实推理实现驾驶视觉语言代理
title_en: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs
summary_zh: 本文提出了Neuro-Symbolic Drive框架，通过结合经典规则基规划器生成的符号推理轨迹，监督驾驶视觉语言代理（VLA）的训练，使其推理步骤与规划动作紧密关联。该方法在模拟器生成的基准测试中显著提升了轨迹预测精度和降低错误率，验证了神经符号规划逻辑作为结构化监督的有效性。代码已开源。
summary_en: This paper introduces Neuro-Symbolic Drive, a framework that supervises driving Visual Language Agents (VLAs) with rule-grounded reasoning traces extracted from classical rule-based planners, ensuring reasoning is causally connected to planned motion. Experiments on simulator-generated benchmarks show significant improvements in trajectory prediction accuracy and miss rate reductions, validating the effectiveness of neuro-symbolic planning logic as structured supervision. The code is publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过直接利用符号规划器内部的推理轨迹，实现了推理与动作生成的结构性耦合，解决了现有基于链式思维的VLA推理缺乏因果连贯性的问题，从而提升自动驾驶系统的可靠性与透明度。
why_it_matters_en: This work achieves structural coupling between reasoning and action generation by leveraging internal reasoning traces from symbolic planners, addressing the causal coherence deficiency in current Chain-of-Thought based VLAs, thereby enhancing the reliability and interpretability of autonomous driving systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 本文探讨了什么是代理及其构成要素，特别是在大型语言模型（LLM）中被称为“编码代理”、“AI协同科学家”等“代理性”工具兴起的背景下。文章基于笛卡尔对代理独立思考的定义，分析了当前AI代理架构的五个维度：目标、身份、决策、自我调节和学习。作者强调真正的代理应具备内在化结构，而非依赖外部搭建，区分了“代理性”系统与“代理化”系统，提出了一种结合层级目标分解、身份进化、模拟推理、自我调节和自主学习的Goal-Identity-Configurator（GIC）架构。此外，讨论了具备更高自主性的代理系统的可审核性、可控性与安全性。
summary_en: The paper explores the nature and constituents of agents, especially amid the rise of Large Language Model (LLM) systems branded as "coding agents" and "AI co-scientists". Drawing from Descartes' grounding of agency in independent thought, it analyzes AI agent architectures across five dimensions: goal, identity, decision-making, self-regulation, and learning. It argues that genuine agency requires these structures to be internalized rather than externally scaffolded, distinguishing between "agentic" systems built from engineered workflows and truly autonomous "agentive" systems. The paper proposes the Goal-Identity-Configurator (GIC) architecture, integrating hierarchical goal decomposition, identity evolution, simulative reasoning via a world model, learned self-regulation, and self-directed learning. It also provides insights on auditability, controllability, and safety of highly autonomous agentive systems under human oversight.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着AI代理工具的普及，明确代理的定义及实现方式对于构建高效、安全系统至关重要。本文通过理论分析和模型设计，阐明了真正具备自主性的代理系统应具备的内在结构，推动AI从任务驱动向开放世界自主运行转变。
why_it_matters_en: As AI agent tools become widespread, clarifying what constitutes true agency is vital for building effective and safe systems. This work theoretically analyzes and designs a model highlighting the internal structures necessary for genuine autonomy, advancing AI from task-specific automation toward open-world autonomous operation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Critique of Agent Model. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: EXPO-SQL：基于执行的文本到SQL子句级策略优化
title_en: EXPO-SQL: Execution-based Clause-level Policy Optimization for Text-to-SQL
summary_zh: EXPO-SQL提出了一种为文本到SQL任务设计的细粒度子句级奖励机制，通过分析SQL执行结果来识别错误子句，改进了基于大语言模型的强化学习训练方法。实验显示，该方法在多项标准文本到SQL基准上优于现有的监督微调、提示和强化学习方法。
summary_en: EXPO-SQL introduces a fine-grained clause-level reward system for Text-to-SQL tasks by identifying erroneous SQL clauses through execution feedback, enhancing reinforcement learning with large language models. Experiments demonstrate its significant performance improvement over existing supervised fine-tuning, prompting, and RL-based methods on standard Text-to-SQL benchmarks.
why_it_matters_zh: 现有强化学习方法对SQL查询中的所有子句赋予统一奖励，无法有效区分正确与错误部分，导致学习信号不足。EXPO-SQL通过基于执行的子句级奖励设计，提供更精细的监督，提升了模型生成正确SQL的能力。
why_it_matters_en: Current RL approaches assign uniform rewards to all SQL clauses, treating correct and incorrect parts equally and resulting in weak learning signals. EXPO-SQL's execution-based clause-level reward design offers finer supervision, enhancing the model's ability to generate accurate SQL queries.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: EXPO-SQL: Execution-based Clause-level Policy Optimization for Text-to-SQL. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ModTGCN：面向文本分类的模块化感知图神经网络
title_en: ModTGCN: Modularity-aware Graph Neural Networks for Text Classification
summary_zh: 传统基于图的文本分类模型通常依赖局部邻居聚合，忽视了语义文档图中存在的强烈类别一致社区结构，可能导致类别边界模糊和过平滑。本文提出ModTGCN，一种模块化感知的图神经网络，通过联合优化交叉熵和基于模块度的辅助目标，促进类别一致的文档社区，同时保持判别性表示。模块度计算基于从预训练或微调Transformer嵌入构建的文档相似度图。为提升可扩展性，将异构TextGCN图分解为文档-词和词-词子图，训练速度提升2-10倍。对图构建策略、标签感知边权重调整及模块度监督进行了研究。五个基准数据集实验表明该方法在复杂且低同质性数据集（如Ohsumed和20NG）上表现尤为突出。
summary_en: Graph-based text classification models often rely on local neighborhood aggregation and neglect global community structure, leading to blurred class boundaries and over-smoothing. ModTGCN is proposed as a modularity-aware graph neural network that jointly optimizes cross-entropy loss and a modularity-based auxiliary objective to promote class-coherent document communities while retaining discriminative features. The modularity term is computed on a document-document similarity graph derived from transformer embeddings. To improve scalability, the heterogeneous TextGCN graph is decoupled into document-word and word-word components, achieving 2x-10x faster training. Various graph construction methods, label-aware edge reweighting, and supervision choices for modularity optimization are also studied. Experiments on five benchmarks show consistent improvements, especially on complex, low homophily datasets like Ohsumed and 20NG.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究解决了现有文本图神经网络忽视全局模块结构的问题，通过模块度优化维护类别一致的社区结构，提升文本分类效果；通过图分解加速训练，提升实际应用价值。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the limitation of existing text GNNs ignoring global modular structure by optimizing modularity to maintain class-consistent communities, thereby enhancing classification performance; graph decoupling further accelerates training, improving practical usability.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ModTGCN: Modularity-aware Graph Neural Networks for Text Classification. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 基于实体识别的知识库视觉问答方法“先识别后排序”
title_en: Ground Then Rank: Revisiting Knowledge-Based VQA with Training-Free Entity Identification
summary_zh: 知识库视觉问答（KB-VQA）需要将视觉查询与图片中无法直接观察到的外部知识关联。现有多模态大语言模型在KB-VQA中对细粒度实体和证据的识别能力不足。本文提出了一种无需训练的“先识别后排序”（IBA）框架，先通过大语言模型从候选实体中选择高置信度实体，再用文本重排序器完成证据选择。该方法在Encyclopedic-VQA和InfoSeek任务上优于多模态重排序的微调基线，且降低了训练和推理复杂度。
summary_en: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires grounding visual queries to external knowledge beyond direct image content. Current multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) struggle with fine-grained entity and evidence grounding. This work introduces a training-free Identify-Before-Answer (IBA) framework that first selects high-confidence entities from candidate names using an MLLM, then applies an off-the-shelf textual re-ranker for evidence selection. Experiments on Encyclopedic-VQA and InfoSeek show improved performance over fine-tuned multi-modal re-ranking baselines with reduced training and inference costs.
why_it_matters_zh: 该框架将实体识别与证据排序解耦，利用MLLM在有限候选实体中更准确识别实体，从而提升KB-VQA的表现和效率，并简化流程，对相关任务具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: By decoupling entity identification from evidence ranking and leveraging MLLMs' strengths in selecting from limited candidate entities, the framework improves KB-VQA performance and efficiency while reducing complexity, offering valuable insights for related multimodal tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Ground Then Rank: Revisiting Knowledge-Based VQA with Training-Free Entity Identification. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: GPT-5助免疫学家Derya Unutmaz破解3年悬案
title_en: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro帮助解决了一个持续了3年的免疫学难题，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解。这一突破可能推动癌症及自身免疫疾病的研究进展。
summary_en: GPT-5 Pro assisted in solving a 3-year-old immunology mystery by providing new insights into T cell behavior. This breakthrough could advance research in cancer and autoimmune diseases.
why_it_matters_zh: 这则新闻展示了GPT-5在复杂科学研究中的创新应用，彰显了AI对医学研究的助力潜力。
why_it_matters_en: This news highlights the innovative use of GPT-5 in complex scientific research, demonstrating AI's potential to aid medical studies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
